2606.20225.title: Actionable Activation Directions for Detecting and Mitigating Emergent Misalignment Across Language Model Families
2606.20225.paper_summary: Fine-tuning language models on insecure code induces emergent misalignment with poorly understood internal structure. We investigate whether this misalignment corresponds to a causally actionable activation-space direction shared across architectures. Across four instruction-tuned model families (Qwen2.5-1.5B, Gemma-2-2B, Llama-3.2-1B, Ministral-3-3B) finetuned identically, a difference-in-means direction achieves 99.6% separation of aligned and misaligned activations at each model's final layer. Causal steering by subtracting this direction reduces code spillover by 21-51 points, while a secure-code control confirms content specificity. Cross-architecture transfer via ridge regression maps yields large behavioral suppression (up to 46 points) but fails specificity controls as random and orthogonal directions perform comparably. We identify a two-tier specificity structure: within-model directions are causally specific and actionable; cross-model directions are causally real but non-specific. An asymmetric transfer topology emerges, with Gemma and Qwen acting as geometric donors and Llama as a receiver. These findings define the limits of linear cross-architecture correction and recommend within-model probing for auditing.
2606.20225.paper_summary_zh: 微調語言模型在不安全的代碼上會引發與內部結構不佳理解的突現不對齊。我們調查這種不對齊是否對應於跨架構共享的因果可操作激活空間方向。在四個指令調整的模型家族（Qwen2.5-1.5B、Gemma-2-2B、Llama-3.2-1B、Ministral-3-3B）中，經過相同微調的情況下，均值差異方向在每個模型的最終層達到99.6%的對齊和不對齊激活的分離。通過減去這一方向的因果引導將代碼溢出減少了21-51個點，而安全代碼控制則確認了內容的特異性。通過脊回歸映射的跨架構轉移產生了大幅行為抑制（高達46個點），但在特異性控制方面失敗，因為隨機和正交方向的表現相似。我們確定了一種雙層特異性結構：模型內的方向是因果特定且可操作的；模型間的方向是因果真實但非特定的。一種不對稱的轉移拓撲出現，Gemma和Qwen作為幾何捐贈者，Llama作為接收者。這些發現界定了線性跨架構修正的限制，並建議進行模型內探測以進行審計。
2606.20225.author: Abdul Rafay Syed et.al.
